title: Execution log spike (Plan 01 — D-01 registration proof)
description: Phase 6 Plan 01 spike artifact pending replacement by Plan 03. Proves that a project-scope GSD capability overlay authored under .gsd/capabilities/ can be installed with consent and observed active in `gsd_run loop render-hooks <point> --raw` output from inside this repo — resolving RESEARCH.md Open Question 1 (D-01's registration mechanism) before Plan 03 builds the real execution-log capability on top of it.

workflow.execution_log_spike.description: Gates the Plan 01 spike contribution only. Not a real feature toggle — this capability exists solely to prove D-01's registration mechanism and is superseded by Plan 03's real execution-log capability.
